test-method.name: verifyCheckoutWithoutLoginShowsStockBlock
test-method.description: Attempt checkout without logging in and capture the out-of-stock block shown by the live site

test-method.name: verifyLoggedInCheckoutShowsStockBlock
test-method.description: Attempt checkout as a logged-in user and capture the out-of-stock block shown by the live site

exception.message: invalid selector: Unable to locate an element with the xpath expression //h2[normalize-space()='My Account' because of the following error: SyntaxError: Failed to execute 'evaluate' on 'Document': The string '//h2[normalize-space()='My Account'' is not a valid XPath expression. test-method.name: verifyCartQuantityUpdateChangesLineTotal
test-method.description: Update the quantity of a product in the cart and verify the line total changes

test-method.name: verifyHeaderCartCountReflectsAddedItems
test-method.description: Verify the cart icon in the header reflects the correct item count

test-method.name: verifyProductCanBeAddedToCart
test-method.description: Add a product to cart and verify it appears with the correct name and price

test-method.name: verifyProductCanBeRemovedFromCart
test-method.description: Remove a product from the cart and verify the cart becomes empty

test-method.name: verifyCheckoutShowsStockWarning
test-method.description: Attempt checkout from cart and capture the stock warning shown by the live site

test-method.name: verifyInvalidEmailFormatValidation
test-method.description: Enter an invalid email format during registration and verify browser validation

test-method.name: verifyRegistrationValidationMessagesForEmptyFields
test-method.description: Submit registration with empty fields and verify validation messages are shown

test-method.name: verifyEmptySearchShowsNoResultsMessage
test-method.description: Verify empty search shows the no-results message and capture evidence

exception.message: Search result page should be displayed for an empty search. expected [true] but found [false]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Search result page should be displayed for an empty search. expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at com.srm.ninjashop.tests.ProductTests.verifyEmptySearchShowsNoResultsMessage(ProductTests.java:40) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke0(Native Method) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(NativeMethodAccessorImpl.java:77) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.java:43) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:568) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodInvocationHelper.invokeMethod(MethodInvocationHelper.java:141) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeMethod(TestInvoker.java:686) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethod(TestInvoker.java:230) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodRunner.runInSequence(MethodRunner.java:63) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker$MethodInvocationAgent.invoke(TestInvoker.java:992) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethods(TestInvoker.java:203) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.invokeTestMethods(TestMethodWorker.java:154) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.run(TestMethodWorker.java:134) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.Executors$RunnableAdapter.call(Executors.java:539) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:264) at org.testng.internal.thread.graph.TestNGFutureTask.run(TestNGFutureTask.java:22) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1136) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:635) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:842)

test-method.name: verifyProductDetailsShowNameAndPrice
test-method.description: Open a product detail page and verify product name and price are shown

test-method.name: verifySearchDisplaysResults
test-method.description: Search for a product by keyword and verify results are displayed

test-method.name: verifyTopCategoryDisplaysProducts
test-method.description: Navigate to a top category and verify products are listed

test-method.name: verifyLoginScenarios
test-method.description: Verify login success and login failure using DataProvider

test-method.name: verifyLoginScenarios
test-method.description: Verify login success and login failure using DataProvider

test-method.name: verifyLogoutRedirectsToHomePage

test-method.name: verifyUserCanRegisterSuccessfully
test-method.description: Verify registration with a unique email and valid data is successful
